<!--
Thanks for the contribution. Keep this template short — anything
non-applicable, just delete. The goal is enough context for a
reviewer to understand the change without spelunking through the diff.
-->

## What changed
<!-- One or two sentences. The "why" matters more than the "what" — the
diff shows what; you should explain why. -->

## How it was tested
<!-- Engine changes need a passing `npm test`. UI changes: how did you
verify the feature in a browser, and which edge cases did you check?
Saying "tested locally" without specifics defeats the purpose. -->

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (typecheck + lint + tests + build)
- [ ] Added / updated tests for any engine-touching change
- [ ] If UI: exercised the feature in a browser; checked the golden path
      and at least one edge case

## Notes for the reviewer
<!-- Anything non-obvious: design tradeoffs you weighed, alternatives
you rejected, follow-ups you're deliberately leaving for later. Empty
is fine if the diff speaks for itself. -->
